extra.message: sqlalchemy.text passes the constructed SQL statement to the database mostly unchanged. Use normal SQLAlchemy operators (such as `or_()`, `and_()`, etc.) to construct SQL.

extra.message: Detected a dynamic value being used with urllib. urllib supports 'file://' schemes, so a dynamic value controlled by a malicious actor may allow them to read arbitrary files.
